{{CargoRelic
|name=Moenn Faucet
|class_id=22414
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=09-11
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Sept 11, 1947 AD, the world's first single-handle mixing faucet was manufactured.<br>Early faucets used two handles to control water temperature, but they posed a scalding risk. A young man named Al Moen got the idea of using a single handle to solve this problem after being scalded himself. He invented the single-handle mixing faucet, which quickly gained popularity and received praise from users. Ten years later, Moen's invention was selected as one of the top 100 best-designed mass-produced products by Fortune magazine.
|fame=47
|art=22
|fth=25
|civ=31
|tech=29
|ss1=Zombie Minion HP +1%
|ss2=Zombie Minion HP +2%
|ss3=Zombie Minion HP +3%
|ss4=Zombie Minion HP +5%
|ss7=Zombie Minion HP +5%<br>Zombie Minion HP +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Swampsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Swamp Sanctum: Swamp Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
